name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG fabric is a classic material widely used in the brand's handbag and apparel series. In the Gucci Insignia fashion collection, this high-recognizability classic jacquard fabric returns, using a full-body layout design to inject rich details into many classic luggage pieces. Brown leather trim adds charm to this backpack. For more details. Beige and ivory white GG jacquard fabric, beige leather trim, gold-tone hardware.

Brown leather trim adds charm to this backpack. For more details. Beige and ivory white GG jacquard fabric, beige leather trim, gold-tone hardware.
Model: 674147.
Size: 26.5x 30x 13cm.
Color: Beige Oatmeal / PVC.
